label: afraid
text: The hallway lights flickered out, and Mara held her breath as footsteps paused outside the locked door.

label: angry
text: Jon folded the letter slowly, jaw tight, then asked why his name had been removed from work he had done.

label: ashamed
text: After the meeting, Lina kept her eyes on the floor and replayed the careless joke she wished she could take back.

label: calm
text: The rain tapped the window while Elias sorted the papers, breathing evenly and answering each question without hurry.

label: curious
text: Nora leaned closer to the old device, turning it in her hands and wondering what the hidden switch might reveal.

label: desperate
text: With the deadline minutes away, Amir refreshed the broken page again and again, searching for any possible workaround.

label: envious
text: When Priya saw the announcement, she smiled politely, then stared at the promotion she had wanted for years.

label: frustrated
text: The same error appeared for the seventh time, and Theo pressed his palms against the desk before starting over.

label: guilty
text: Mateo heard his friend's message and felt the weight of the promise he had quietly failed to keep.

label: happy
text: The team burst into laughter when the prototype finally worked, and Ava could not stop grinning at the screen.

label: hopeful
text: Even after the rejection, Sam opened a fresh document and began drafting the next application with steadier hands.

label: loving
text: Elena tucked the blanket around her brother and stayed beside him until his breathing softened into sleep.

label: nervous
text: Before stepping onto the stage, Imani checked the note cards three times and felt her fingers tremble.

label: proud
text: When the final score appeared, Daniel stood a little taller, remembering every early morning he had trained alone.

label: relieved
text: The doctor said the scan was clear, and everyone in the room let out the breath they had been holding.

label: sad
text: Mila packed the last photograph into the box and sat quietly in the empty room after the movers left.
